user.title: Connect PoolMath
user.description: Choose how Home Assistant should authenticate with PoolMath.

login.title: Sign in to PoolMath
login.description: Your password is used only to obtain a PoolMath authorization token and is not saved.

basic.title: Use an existing authorization
basic.description: Advanced option: enter the complete value beginning with `Basic `.

pool.title: Select a PoolMath pool
pool.description: Choose the pool that will receive WaterGuru measurements.

sensors.title: Select WaterGuru sensors
sensors.description: Free chlorine, pH, and temperature are required. Other values are optional.

data_description.temperature_entity: Celsius is converted to Fahrenheit automatically.
data_description.total_hardness_entity: Stored in diagnostics only because PoolMath has no matching field.
data_description.phosphate_entity: Stored in diagnostics only because PoolMath has no matching field.
data_description.copper_entity: Stored in diagnostics only because PoolMath has no matching field.
data_description.iron_entity: Stored in diagnostics only because PoolMath has no matching field.

reauth_login.title: Reconnect PoolMath
reauth_login.description: Enter your PoolMath credentials to generate a fresh authorization token. Your password is not saved.

error.authorization_format: The value must begin with Basic followed by the encoded credential.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to PoolMath. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_auth: PoolMath rejected the credentials or authorization.
error.invalid_time_zone: Select a valid IANA time zone.
error.no_pools: No active pools were found in this PoolMath account.
error.pool_not_found: The configured pool is no longer available in this account.

abort.already_configured: This PoolMath pool is already configured.

init.title: Automatic synchronization schedule
init.description: Choose the time and time zone used for the once-daily PoolMath submission.

data_description.submit_time: The selected time is interpreted in the chosen time zone.
data_description.time_zone: Uses an IANA zone such as America/Chicago and follows daylight-saving changes.
data_description.max_reading_age_hours: Submission is blocked when any selected sensor is older than this limit.
